title: FreeDraw
body:
In-world brush & eraser  
![sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de07b17923bebf31ec1762c108f646d4677e4e4.png)
[Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) is supported.  
This mod is using vanilla items. Default brush item is minecraft:brush, eraser item is minecraft:resin_brick, with specific CustomModelData.  
/give @s minecraft:brush[minecraft:custom_model_data={floats:[-1]}]  
/give @s minecraft:resin_brick[minecraft:custom_model_data={floats:[-1]}]

Draw color can be changed. Use /drawcolor RRGGBB(hex) to change draw color. /drawcolor rainbow is available since v1.  
Default max points is 2048. All these can be changed in server config.
